name: Pierogi Fillings, Potato
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes until tender.
2. Drain well.
3. Add butter, salt, pepper, and onion (if using) to mashed potatoes.
4. When mixture is cool enough to handle, it is ready to use.
Note: You may wish to combine cheese or sauerkraut with the potatoes. If so, mix 2/3 of the mashed potatoes with 1/3 of other ingredients.
